subject: FW: FOR JE'S ATTENTION - CORRESPONDENCE WITH WEIZMANN INSTITUTE - 1
body:
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 

________________________________

From: egneurocog@aol.com [mailto:egneurocog@aol.com] 
Sent: Monday, March 24, 2008 12:37 PM
To: Lesley Groff; Lesley Groff
Subject: Fwd: FOR JE'S ATTENTION - CORRESPONDENCE WITH WEIZMANN
INSTITUTE - 1


Dear Lesley,

Jeffrey is aware of the discussions I am conducting with The Weizmann
Institute in Israel about  possible collaborative research. I had
another long telephone conversation with them on Sunday, followed by
email exchange. I am forwarding to you two self-explanatory emails (this
and the following one) for Jeffrey's attention. Both contain
attachments. If you could, please open them for Jeffrey's attention.
Please let him know that I would like to discuss this with him further
at his convenience. Thanks.

Best wishes,


EG

Elkhonon Goldberg, Ph.D., ABPP

Clinical Professor of Neurology
New York University School of Medicine

Diplomate
American Board of Professional Psychology
in Clinical Neuropsychology

315 West 57th Street
Suite 401
New York, NY 10019
USA

tel +1 212 541 6412
fax +1 212 765 7158
egneurocog@aol.com
elkhonon.goldberg@med.nyu.edu
www.elkhonongoldberg.com

-----Original Message-----
From: egneurocog@aol.com
To: misha@weizmann.ac.il
Sent: Sun, 23 Mar 2008 12:15 pm
Subject: Fwd: RESEARCH PROPOSAL


Dear Misha,

I look forward to your further thoughts on the possible collaboration.
Meanwhile, attached is a very rough ("written not read") draft of a
chapter for the new edition of The Executive Brain: Frontal Lobes and
the Civilized Mind, Oxford Univ. Press, orginally published in 2001
(paperback 2002). It sketches some of the work that I have in mind.

Best wishes,


EG

Elkhonon Goldberg, Ph.D., ABPP

Clinical Professor of Neurology
New York University School of Medicine

Diplomate
American Board of Professional Psychology
in Clinical Neuropsychology

315 West 57th Street
Suite 401
New York, NY 10019
USA

tel +1 212 541 6412
fax +1 212 765 7158
egneurocog@aol.com <mailto:egneurocog@aol.com> 
elkhonon.goldberg@med.nyu.edu <mailto:elkhonon.goldberg@med.nyu.edu> 
www.elkhonongoldberg.com <http://www.elkhonongoldberg.com/> 


-----Original Message-----
From: Misha Tsodyks <misha@weizmann.ac.il>
To: egneurocog@aol.com
Sent: Fri, 21 Mar 2008 11:06 am
Subject: Re: RESEARCH PROPOSAL


OK, good to hear things are moving. You can call the same number as last
time (972-8-9342157), after 5pm my time (minus seven if you are still on
winter time). 
 
Best 
Misha
